M-CONFIG.NAME: Runtime Config
M-CONFIG.Purpose: Provide the canonical source of deployment and runtime configuration for all KPprotoN modules.

Scope.Item: Define domain, ports, secret, and storage paths
Define a private per-SNI secret salt used to derive user-specific MTProto credentials
Expose shared configuration for release and container layers
Drive mtproto_proxy bootstrap retry and upstream timeout settings
Define the host 443 publish target used by Docker Compose when HTTPS is exposed directly from Cowboy TLS

Interfaces.Interface: Reads `.env` and transforms it into runtime settings.
Maps env into `sys.config` or release-time config.

Risks.Risk: Configuration drift between shell, Docker Compose, and Erlang runtime
Missing or weak per-SNI salt silently downgrades the intended proxy isolation model
